title: Mynock (disambiguation)
content:
[[File:Mynock-SWK19.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The mynock, for which all other "mynock" items are named]]
The term '''mynock''' could refer to the following:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Mynock]]''', a [[bat]]-like [[Parasite|parasitic]] [[species]]
*'''[[Mynock Cloud City]]''', a spicy [[Foodstuff|dish]] made from the mynock species
*'''[[Mynock Coronet City]]''', a spicy dish made from the mynock species
*'''[[Mynock Grottos]]''', a location on the world of [[Dandoran]]
*'''[[Mynock Minute]]''', a [[fathier]] [[Gender|colt]] owned by [[Ubbla Mollbro]]
*'''[[Mynock steak]]''', a dish edible by [[human]]s
*'''[[Fried mynock]]''', a dish popular with [[Twi'lek]]s
*'''[[Little Mynock Airscooter]]''', a model of toy [[airspeeder]]
*'''[[Myder's Mynocks]]''', a subsidiary of surveillance company [[Transcept Media Solutions]]
*'''[[Operation: Mynock Bite]]''', a military operation carried out by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic]]
*'''[[Ord Mynock]]''', the homeworld of the mynock species
*'''[[Ord Mynock system]]''', a [[star system]]
*'''[[Sand mynock]]''', a subspecies of mynock
*'''[[Form III|Way of the Mynock]]''', another name for the [[Jedi]] [[Lightsaber combat|lightsaber Form]] Soresu
*"'''[[Wild mynock chase]]'''," a [[List of phrases and slang|slang phrase]] used in [[the galaxy]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Mynock/Legends|Mynock]]''', a silicone-based creature commonly found living in [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid fields]]
*'''[[R5-G8/Legends|Mynock]]''', also known as '''R5-G8''', [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles's]] [[R5-series astromech droid|R5]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]]
*[[Mynock (smuggler)|'''Mynock''']], a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] allied with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]
*[[Mynock (SIS)|'''Mynock''']], an [[Agent/Legends|agent]] who served the [[Republic Strategic Information Service]]
*[[Mynock (Mandalorian)|'''Mynock''']], a [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] warrior
*"'''[[PS-29-2|Mynock]]'''," an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[TIE/LN starfighter]] [[TIE pilot|pilot]]
*[[Mynock (Helot-class)|'''''Mynock''''']], the personal [[Starship/Legends|starship]] of [[Cade Skywalker]]
*'''[[Mynockra system]]''', a [[Star system/Legends|star system]]
*'''[[Mynock 7 Space Station|Mynock 7]]''', a [[Space station/Legends|space station]]
*'''[[Mynock booster]]''', a booster system produced by [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Industries]]
*'''[[Mynock-class assault boat|''Mynock''-class Assault Boat]]''', a [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] systems patrol craft
*'''[[Mynock Corner]]''', an area within the [[Space station/Legends|space station]] [[Mek-Sha]]
*'''[[Mynock Coronet City/Legends|Mynock Coronet City]]''', spicy [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] cuisine
*'''[[Mynock Extermination Droid]]''', a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] designed to clear out mynock infestations
*'''[[Mynock Fever]]''', a [[Disease/Legends|disease]]
*'''''[[Mynock Fodder 62009]]''''', a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]]
*'''[[Mynock's Haven]]''', a tavern in [[Coronet City]] on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]
*'''[[Mynock Hole]]''', a tavern in [[Vlarnya]] on [[Courkrus]]
*'''[[Mynock juice/Legends|Mynock juice]]''', a liquid
*'''[[Mynock mud pie]]''', a dessert served at [[Aucellis Park]] on [[Keriba VI]]
*'''[[Mynock muffins]]''', an expletive used on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]
*'''[[Mynock Puffing]]''', a blood sport
*'''[[Mynock stew]]''', a type of [[Stew/Legends|stew]]
*'''[[Mynock Surprise]]''', a code phrase
*'''[[Mynock virus]]''', a [[Computer virus/Legends|computer virus]] developed by [[Corazon Industries]]
*'''[[Mynock II virus]]''', a computer virus modified by [[Faerz Waleth]] of [[Nebula Consumables]]
*'''[[Banthas and mynocks]]''', a [[Youngling/Legends|children's]] game
*'''''[[Blind Mynock]]''''', a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] freighter
*"'''[[Blue Mynock]]'''," an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[call sign]]
*'''[[Domesticated mynock]]''', a variant of the mynock species
*'''[[Glittering Mynock]]''', a variant of the mynock species
*'''[[The Home mynock]]s''', an intelligent, [[The Force/Legends|Force]]-wielding subspecies of mynock found on one specific [[The Home|asteroid]]
*'''''[[Moldy Mynock]]''''', a starship
*'''[[Mutant mynock]]''', a mutated variant of mynock that achieved [[Sentience/Legends|sentience]]
*'''''[[Night Mynock]]''''', a book written by [[Rogar Farnoster]] prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]
*'''[[Ord Mynock/Legends|Ord Mynock]]''', the supposed [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the mynock creature
*'''[[Ord Mynock Freeport]]''', the only [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] on Ord Mynock
*'''[[Rabid Mynocks]]''', a [[Swoop gang/Legends|swoop gang]] operating in [[Gallisport]] on [[Shesharile 5]]
*'''[[Salt mynock]]''', a [[Subspecies/Legends|subspecies]] of the mynock, found on [[Lok/Legends|Lok]]
*'''[[Skinning the Mynock]]''', an area on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Eskaron]]
*'''[[Snow Mynock]]''', a variant of the [[Mynock/Legends|mynock]] living on [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]
*'''[[Spiced Mynock Wing]]''', a [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] available on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Cato Neimoidia/Legends|Cato Neimoidia]]
*'''[[Sulfur mynock]]''', a subspecies of mynock found on the planet [[Lok/Legends|Lok]]
*'''[[Team Mynock]]''', a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]
*'''[[Tibanna mynock]]''', a species of mynock found on the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]]
*'''[[The Tipsy Mynock]]''', a tavern on [[Karfeddion/Legends|Karfeddion]]
*'''[[Form III/Legends|Way of the Mynock]]''', another name for the [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|Jedi lightsaber Form]] Soresu

==[[In-universe|Out-of-universe]]==
*"[[Mynocks (episode)|'''Mynocks''']]," an episode of ''[[Star Wars Galaxy of Creatures]]''
*'''''[[The Mynock Conspiracy]]''''', a mini-adventure published in the [[Supernova (WEG)|''Supernova'']] supplement for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''
*"'''[[Do Clones dream of Electric Mynocks?]]'''," a [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] published on the [[LEGO]] ''Star Wars'' website

{{Disambig}}

|de=Mynock (Begriffsklärung)
